title: DAY 19 — CRM-M17 — EOD OPERATIONS & DAILY REPORTING

questions.question: How many platform tabs must be opened during day-start setup, and in which tool must the status be set to "Available"?

options.text: 8 tabs; BIK must be set to Available
12 tabs; MyOperator must be set to Available
10 tabs; Freshdesk must be set to Available
12 tabs; Shiprocket must be set to Active

questions.question: What is the correct day-start procedure for the daily order snapshot?

options.text: Open Shopify admin → screenshot new orders → email to CRM Asst Manager
FIMS → OMS → Shopify → Orders → New Orders → take screenshot → post to #customer-care Slack channel
Shiprocket → New Orders → screenshot → post to #after-sale-services Slack
FIMS → OMS → Shopify → Returns → screenshot → post to #qaqc-crm Slack

questions.question: Which 4 Google Sheets must be opened in the second Chrome window at day-start?

options.text: CRM Daily Work Sheet, Callback Request Sheet, Shiprocket Web Tracker, Comment Reply Sheet (Modified tab)
CRM Daily Work Sheet, NDR Sheet, RMA Sheet, Cancellation Order Sheet
Daily Reporting Sheet, Prototype Feedback Sheet, Shiprocket Web Tracker, DTDC Sheet
CRM Daily Work Sheet, Callback Request Sheet, Mails Sheet, Performance Analytics Sheet

questions.question: The MyOperator Followup tab covers follow-ups across how many departments?

options.text: 3 departments: Orders, Returns, Repairs
5 departments: Orders, Returns & Replacements, Refunds, Repairs, General Inquiry & Support
4 departments: Orders, Cancellations, Returns, Repairs
6 departments: Orders, Returns, Refunds, Repairs, Callbacks, Escalations

meta.criteria: MyOperator Followup ZERO Rule & Callback SLA

questions.question: Why must the MyOperator Followup tab be cleared to ZERO before logout?

options.text: It resets the agent's KPI dashboard for the next day
Every open entry represents a customer waiting for a resolution call; open entries carry over, create missed-contact situations, and reduce the IBC Connect Rate KPI
MyOperator charges per open entry left overnight
Team Leader cannot generate the daily report if any entries remain open

meta.criteria: MyOperator Followup ZERO Rule & Callback SLA

questions.question: A follow-up customer is called 3 times across the shift but does not answer. What status should be set in MyOperator?

options.text: Not Connected
In Progress
Unreachable
Closed

meta.criteria: MyOperator Followup ZERO Rule & Callback SLA

questions.question: What is the SLA for actioning a callback request, and where are callback requests auto-populated from?

options.text: 4-hour SLA; auto-populated from Freshdesk
2-hour SLA from request timestamp; auto-populated from BIK WhatsApp
1-hour SLA; auto-populated from MyOperator missed calls
Same-day SLA; manually entered by the executive

meta.criteria: MyOperator Followup ZERO Rule & Callback SLA

questions.question: How many CRM Daily Work Sheet tabs must be verified complete at EOD, and what is the submission deadline?

options.text: 7 tabs; submit by 5:30 PM
10 tabs; submit by 6:00 PM
12 tabs; submit by 6:30 PM
10 tabs; submit by 5:00 PM

questions.question: After completing the CRM Daily Work Sheet, what must the executive do in Clickup?

options.text: Create a new task for tomorrow's work and assign it to themselves
Navigate to Customer Support → Action Items → Board View, locate their created tasks, add daily work data, and update task status to "Review"
Submit a summary email to CRM Asst Manager with Clickup link
Export the daily report from Clickup as PDF and share via Slack

questions.question: What is the first item on the 10-point pre-logout final verification?

options.text: All Freshdesk tickets actioned
Daily Work Report submitted to Team Leader by 6 PM
MyOperator Followup tab = ZERO
Shiprocket NDR panel: all NDRs actioned today

questions.question: Which of the following is one of the 8 column groups in the Daily Reporting Performance Analytics sheet?

options.text: Customer Satisfaction Score
Interaction Pendencies (Pending Tickets BIK, Pending Social Media IG/FB/YT, Pending Reviews, Pending Mails)
Agent Ranking
Weekly KRA Summary

questions.question: The pre-logout verification includes checking the Shiprocket wallet balance. What is the correct action if the balance is low or zero?

options.text: Process remaining orders and inform management the next morning
Inform management immediately; do not process new orders until the wallet is recharged
Transfer funds from the Gmail account associated with Shiprocket
Escalate via #qaqc-crm Slack channel

questions.question: Which of the following is a common compliance failure listed in the checklist?

options.text: Not checking the Dashboard tab at the start of shift
Processing a FIMS order without checking Order History first
Not using Metricool for Instagram comments
Not logging Shiprocket escalations in Clickup

questions.question: An executive closes a Freshdesk ticket but forgets to log it in the Mails tab of the CRM Daily Work Sheet. Is this a compliance issue?

options.text: No — the Freshdesk system tracks the ticket automatically
Yes — closing a Freshdesk ticket without logging in the Mails tab is a listed compliance failure; every interaction must be logged
No — the Mails tab only applies to escalation emails, not regular Freshdesk tickets
Yes — but only for order-related tickets, not general inquiries

questions.question: For an internal CRM team escalation (e.g., after-sale issue requiring cross-team coordination), which escalation route should be used?

options.text: Gmail → Compose → Shiprocket Executives
FIMS → Support → Add Ticket → Submit
#after-sale-services Slack channel
MyOperator customer care

questions.question: An executive uses the original "Comment Reply" tab instead of the "Modified Comment Reply" tab for a social media reply. Is this a compliance failure?

options.text: No — both tabs contain the same templates
Yes — using the original Comment Reply tab for templates is a listed compliance failure; the Modified tab supersedes the original
No — the original tab is acceptable for YouTube comments only
Yes — but only if the reply was posted publicly, not for DMs
